summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Conflict-as-a-Service dashboard MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI loads properly with all core features working including statistics display, charts, data tables, news ticker, and settings page navigation.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (200 OK)
Conflicts endpoint returns 8 conflicts with proper data structure
News endpoint returns 20 articles from RSS feeds
Stats endpoint returns aggregated data (1.9M total deaths, 6 active conflicts)
Manual refresh endpoint works correctly
API key configuration endpoints (GET/POST) work properly
Dashboard loads with all statistics cards displaying correct values
Active conflicts count shows '6' with blinking LIVE indicator
Casualty breakdown pie chart renders correctly
Deaths by country bar chart displays data properly
Conflicts table populated with all 8 conflicts
News ticker scrolls and displays articles from RSS feeds
News ticker items open in new tab when clicked
Settings page navigation works via header icon
API key form accepts input and saves successfully
API key masking works in configured keys list
Back to dashboard navigation works
Manual refresh button accessible and functional via header icon
Auto-refresh mechanism scheduled every 5 minutes (APScheduler)
No JavaScript errors or console warnings

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All core functionality working, minor branding issue only
